2.1.6: Animated starfield and wave logo on login and server select screens
Login and server select screens now use your saved theme
Added Arcane Rift toggle — auto presses Q on a timer, only when Feather Client is focused
Header buttons reorganised into a Settings dropdown
Auto Logout is now toggleable with a configurable duration
Logout button is now bright red for clarity
Hardware ID locking — accounts are tied to the device they first log in on
Admin can clear a user's hardware ID from the Users tab
Help screen updated to cover all features
Fixed script card hover outline and ? button not updating on theme change
Blank window simplified to Back and Theme only
Update popup now appears after login, is draggable and centred on screen
Pressing Later on update popup now correctly continues to the app
